name: Beer Soup with Cheese
recipeIngredient: Garnish: 1 cup cheese (such as Cheddar or Monterey Jack), cubed into 1/4-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, sauté chopped onions in margarine or butter until translucent.
2. Add beer and let it simmer for about 5 minutes to reduce the alcohol content slightly.
3. Stir in carrot, celery, chicken broth, salt, cumin, nutmeg, and pepper. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for about 20-25 minutes until vegetables are tender.
4. Stir in sour cream and cook for an additional minute.
5. Serve hot, garnished with cubed cheese of your choice.
